purpose: Define configurable submitido handling for Phase A so questionnaire completion, admin review, HR submitido and liquidation eligibility remain separate and auditable.

allowManualOverride.note: Manual override must require admin note and HR reference.

rules: questionnaireCompletedAt is not enough to set submitido_registered.
For hr_driven mode, submitidoAt must come from an HR field candidate tied to the same tenantId, projectId and hrRowId.
For manual_admin_hr_confirmed mode, adminConfirmationNote and HR reference are required.
submitidoAt must not be in the future.
submitidoAt should not be before questionnaireCompletedAt unless syncConflict and admin note exist.
Liquidation eligibility requires submitido_registered unless project config allows explicit admin exception.
No HR/platform conflict may be overwritten silently.
Every status change must append auditTrail.
conflictTriggers: same visitId has two different submitidoAt values
HR row submitido belongs to another project or tenant
submitidoAt is earlier than questionnaireCompletedAt without admin note
submitido exists but visit is cancelled
submitido exists for shopperId different from assignment shopperId
submitido source is platform-only while project mode is hr_driven
hardStops: Do not write HR from this contract.
Do not write Firestore from this contract.
Do not call Make from this contract.
Do not infer submitido from questionnaire completed alone.
Do not mark a liquidation payable when submitido status is pending or conflicted.
commercializablePrototypeNotes: Submitido origin must be configurable per project, not hard-coded to TyA.
The UI should show source system and status honestly: HR-driven, external system, platform review or manual HR-confirmed.
The UI should keep questionnaire completion, submitido and liquidation eligibility as separate visible states.
Tenant/project labels may change, but the internal submitido modes should remain canonical.
